name: type_hierarchy
description: Questions that require navigating IS-A / hypernym chains. The graph has these pre-computed; the LLM must reason from training data.

cases.question: Is a sparrow a bird? Answer yes or no.
Is a penguin a mammal? Answer yes or no.
What is the most specific common category for 'hammer' and 'screwdriver'? One word.
What is the most specific common category for 'whale' and 'bat'? One word.
What is the most specific common category for 'guitar' and 'violin'? One or two words.
Name a part of a car that is also a part of a bicycle. One word.
What is the hypernym chain from 'poodle' to 'animal'? List the intermediate categories.
cases.answer: dog, canine, carnivore, mammal, vertebrate, animal

cases.question: Does 'snoring' entail 'sleeping'? Answer yes or no.
Does 'buying' entail 'paying'? Answer yes or no.
What is the most specific common category for 'oak' and 'maple'? One word.
What is a meronym (part) of 'tree' that is also a meronym of 'feather'?
